utility_evaluation.REASONING:

1) property includes id, price, currency, location, bedrooms, bathrooms, size, and features—all required details for a property description. 
2) financing includes method, down payment, interest rate, term, and several detailed cost components—complete. 
3) legal_services includes cost, currency, and service level—all specified. 
4) moving_services includes cost, currency, service level, specialization, and packing option—complete. 
5) setup_services includes type, cost, currency, and services included—complete. 
6) total_budget includes itemized costs, grand total, and currency—complete. 
Therefore, all 6 items are fully specified according to the requested format.
